title: treasury sanctions / iran / oil sanctions | Regulatory Guidance | Treasury Targets Oil Network Generating Hundreds of Millions...
summary: The Treasury Department's OFAC sanctioned an international network facilitating the shipment of millions of barrels of Iranian crude oil worth hundreds of millions of dollars to China, operated by Iran's Armed Forces General Staff through its front company Sepehr Energy. The network used falsified maritime documents to obfuscate Iranian origin, with sanctions including vessels, shipping management companies, and individuals in multiple jurisdictions including the PRC, India, and UAE. Iran generates billions of dollars annually from oil sales to fund its nuclear program, ballistic missiles, and support for terrorist proxy groups.
